languages.text: "По крупицам информации, что мне удалось собрать воедино, я пришел к выводу, что Инквизицию интересовал тот сектор космоса в целом, а Амсанкт был лишь малой частью операции. Нас перевезли туда на некоем чартистском судне в целях сохранения секретности — подозреваю, что чартисты были лишь прикрытием. Наша с Нунциусом экспертиза была неоценима для изучения ксеноруин, так что мы были поставлены во главе исследовательской группы и снабжены всем необходимым оборудованием".

"From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."
languages.original_text: "По крупицам информации, что мне удалось собрать воедино, я пришел к выводу, что Инквизицию интересовал тот сектор космоса в целом, а Амсанкт был лишь малой частью операции. Нас перевезли туда на некоем чартистском судне в целях сохранения секретности — подозреваю, что чартисты были лишь прикрытием. Наша с Нунциусом экспертиза была неоценима для изучения ксеноруин, так что мы были поставлены во главе исследовательской группы и снабжены всем необходимым оборудованием".

Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

"From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

languages.text: «A partir de la poca información que pude organizar, deduje que la Inquisición estaba interesada en ese sector del espacio en su totalidad, y que Amsanct era solo una pequeña parte de la operación. Nos llevaron allí en una nave cartista para guardar el secreto, aunque sospecho que los cartistas eran una tapadera. Nuestro talento era esencial para el estudio de las xenorruinas, por lo que Nuncius y yo fuimos colocados al mando del equipo de investigación y nos entregaron todo el equipo necesario».
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

traits.locale_text: «A partir de la poca información que pude organizar, deduje que la Inquisición estaba interesada en ese sector del espacio en su totalidad, y que Amsanct era solo una pequeña parte de la operación. Nos llevaron allí en una nave cartista para guardar el secreto, aunque sospecho que los cartistas eran una tapadera. Nuestro talento era esencial para el estudio de las xenorruinas, por lo que Nuncius y yo fuimos colocados al mando del equipo de investigación y nos entregaron todo el equipo necesario».

languages.text: “从拼凑出的零星信息来看，我断定审判庭对整个星区都很感兴趣，阿姆桑克特只不过是行动的一小部分。出于保密目的，我们乘坐一艘特许船前往。而我怀疑，那个特许船长的身份只是个掩护。我们在研究异形遗迹方面的专业知识是无价的，因此努恩修斯和我被任命为研究团队的负责人，并获批了所有必要的设备。”
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

traits.locale_text: “从拼凑出的零星信息来看，我断定审判庭对整个星区都很感兴趣，阿姆桑克特只不过是行动的一小部分。出于保密目的，我们乘坐一艘特许船前往。而我怀疑，那个特许船长的身份只是个掩护。我们在研究异形遗迹方面的专业知识是无价的，因此努恩修斯和我被任命为研究团队的负责人，并获批了所有必要的设备。”

languages.text: « D'après les bribes d'informations que j'ai pu recueillir, j'ai compris que l'Inquisition s'intéressait à ce secteur de l'espace dans son ensemble et qu'Amsanct n'était qu'une petite partie d'une vaste entreprise. Nous y avons été conduits à bord d'un certain vaisseau des Cartographes qui, si mes soupçons sont exacts, n'était qu'une couverture visant à préserver la confidentialité de l'opération. Comme notre savoir-faire était indispensable à l'étude des xénoruines, Nuncius et moi avons été nommés responsables de l'équipe de recherche et on nous a fourni tout l'équipement nécessaire. »
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

Nous y avons été conduits à bord d'un certain vaisseau des Cartographes qui, si mes soupçons sont exacts, n'était qu'une couverture visant à préserver la confidentialité de l'opération. Comme notre savoir-faire était indispensable à l'étude des xénoruines, Nuncius et moi avons été nommés responsables de l'équipe de recherche et on nous a fourni tout l'équipement nécessaire. »

languages.text: "Bir araya getirebildiğim bilgi kırıntılarından, Engizisyon'un uzayın o sektörüyle bir bütün olarak ilgilendiği ve Amsanct'ın operasyonun sadece küçük bir parçası olduğu sonucuna vardım. Gizlilik amacıyla oraya belirli bir Haritacı gemisiyle taşındık. Haritacıların kılıf olarak kullanıldığından şüpheleniyordum. Uzmanlığımız, zeno harabelerinin incelenmesi için elzemdi. Bu yüzden Nuncius'la beni araştırma ekibinin başına getirip bize gerekli tüm ekipmanları sağladılar."
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

traits.locale_text: "Bir araya getirebildiğim bilgi kırıntılarından, Engizisyon'un uzayın o sektörüyle bir bütün olarak ilgilendiği ve Amsanct'ın operasyonun sadece küçük bir parçası olduğu sonucuna vardım. Gizlilik amacıyla oraya belirli bir Haritacı gemisiyle taşındık. Haritacıların kılıf olarak kullanıldığından şüpheleniyordum. Uzmanlığımız, zeno harabelerinin incelenmesi için elzemdi. Bu yüzden Nuncius'la beni araştırma ekibinin başına getirip bize gerekli tüm ekipmanları sağladılar."

languages.text: "Aus den Informationen, die ich sammeln konnte, kam ich zu dem Schluss, dass sich die Inquisition für diesen Sektor des Weltraums als Ganzes interessierte und Amsanct nur ein kleiner der Teil der Operation war. Wir wurden aus Gründen der Geheimhaltung mit einem Chartistenschiff dort abgesetzt ... wobei die Chartisten wohl nur als Tarnung dienten. Da unsere Expertise für das Studium von Xenoruinen von unschätzbarem Wert war, erhielten Nuncius und ich das Kommando über das Forschungsteam und die erforderliche Ausrüstung."
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."

traits.locale_text: "Aus den Informationen, die ich sammeln konnte, kam ich zu dem Schluss, dass sich die Inquisition für diesen Sektor des Weltraums als Ganzes interessierte und Amsanct nur ein kleiner der Teil der Operation war. Wir wurden aus Gründen der Geheimhaltung mit einem Chartistenschiff dort abgesetzt ... wobei die Chartisten wohl nur als Tarnung dienten. Da unsere Expertise für das Studium von Xenoruinen von unschätzbarem Wert war, erhielten Nuncius und ich das Kommando über das Forschungsteam und die erforderliche Ausrüstung."

languages.text: 「断片的な情報を総合すると、異端審問官はあの宇宙空間全体に興味を持っており、アムサンクトはその活動のごく一部に過ぎないという結論に達した。アムサンクトはその作戦のほんの一部にすぎなかったのだ。私たちは、あるチャーティストの船で、極秘裏にそこに移送された。チャーティストは単なる隠れ蓑だったのだろう。私たちの専門知識は異星人の研究にとって非常に貴重なものだったので、ヌンシウスと私は研究チームの責任者に任命され、必要な機材はすべて提供されました」。
languages.original_text: "From the bits of information I was able to piece together, I came to the conclusion that the Inquisition was interested in that sector of space as a whole, and that Amsanct was only a small part of the operation. We were transported there on a certain Chartist vessel for the purposes of secrecy — I suspect the Chartists were just a cover. Our expertise was invaluable for the study of xenoruins, so Nuncius and I were placed in charge of the research team and provided with all the necessary equipment."
